bird.name: Scaly-breasted honeyeater
bird.summary: The scaly-breasted honeyeater (Lichmera squamata), also known as the white-tufted honeyeater, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagid…

locations.name: 印度尼西亚
locations.summary: 印度尼西亞共和国（印尼語：Republik Indonesia，IPA讀音：[rɛpʊblɪk ɪndɔnɛsɪa]），通稱印度尼西亞，簡稱印尼，是位于东南亚的群岛国家；由17,506個岛屿组成，是世界上最大的群島國家，疆域橫跨亞洲及大洋…

locations.name: 摩鹿加群岛
locations.summary: 摩鹿加群岛（英語：Maluku Islands，Moluccas；印尼語：Kepulauan Maluku），有時被稱為「東印度群島」，位置处于苏拉威西岛东面、新几内亚西面以及帝汶北面，为印度尼西亚境內众多群岛板块之一，是马来群岛的组成部…

relations.subject: Scaly-breasted honeyeater
relations.evidence: It is endemic to Indonesia, where it occurs in the southern Moluccas
